captureStep.text:
"ReadUntilChar('x')
input: abc, match: false/null, consumed: 0, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: axc, match: true/x, consumed: 2, buffer: ax, remainder: c

setConsumeMatch(false)
input: abc, match: false/null, consumed: 0, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: axc, match: true/x, consumed: 1, buffer: a, remainder: xc

ReadUntilChar(c -> c == 'x' || c == 'y')
input: abc, match: false/null, consumed: 0, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: axc, match: true/x, consumed: 2, buffer: ax, remainder: c

setConsumeMatch(false)
input: abc, match: false/null, consumed: 0, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: axc, match: true/x, consumed: 1, buffer: a, remainder: xc
"

"input: abcdefg, matches: [] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [a] -> matched: a, buffer: a, remainder: bcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [x] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> matched: bcd, buffer: abcd, remainder: efg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> matched: bcd, buffer: abcd, remainder: efg
preferLong = true
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcdx] -> matched: bcd, buffer: abcd, remainder: efg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> matched: bcde, buffer: abcde, remainder: fg
input: abcdefg, matches: [def, defgh] -> matched: def, buffer: abcdef, remainder: g
preventAdvance = true
input: abcdefg, matches: [abc] -> matched: abc, buffer: abc, remainder: defg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg

consumeMatch = false
input: abcdefg, matches: [] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [a] -> matched: a, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [x] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> matched: bcd, buffer: a, remainder: bcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> matched: bcd, buffer: a, remainder: bcdefg
preferLong = true
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcdx] -> matched: bcd, buffer: a, remainder: bcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd, bcde] -> matched: bcde, buffer: a, remainder: bcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [def, defgh] -> matched: def, buffer: abc, remainder: defg
preventAdvance = true
input: abcdefg, matches: [abc] -> matched: abc, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg
input: abcdefg, matches: [bcd] -> matched: null, buffer: , remainder: abcdefg

repeated
Buffer: ab-cd-, Stream: ef
"

"ReadUntilString('012')
input: abc, match: false/null, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: a012b, match: true/012, buffer: a012, remainder: b

setConsumeMatch(false)
input: abc, match: false/null, buffer: , remainder: abc
input: a012b, match: true/012, buffer: a, remainder: 012b
"

"testReadWhileChar('a')
input: abc, buffer: a, remainder: bc
input: xyz, buffer: , remainder: xyz

testReadWhileChar(c -> c == 'a' || c == 'b')
input: abc, buffer: ab, remainder: c
input: xyz, buffer: , remainder: xyz
"

"input: abc, consumed: abc, escaped: false
input: ab-x, consumed: ab, escaped: false
input: ab--cd-x, consumed: ab--cd, escaped: true
"

"input: abc, consumed: abc, escaped: false
input: ab]x, consumed: ab, escaped: false
input: ab-]cd]x, consumed: ab-]cd, escaped: true
"
